editor_note: The package is ready for substantive review under the STEM claim-audit framework. The manuscript includes source, references, funding statement, bounded claims, tables, and a claim audit trail. For full computational reproducibility, authors should also provide analysis code, data dictionary, and variable-construction scripts.
